---
title: Document Title
format:
  pjk_theme-html:
    toc: true
author: Jonas Kreutzer
date: last-modified
---

## Introduction

This template demonstrates the **pjk_theme** for HTML documents.

## Text & Links

Regular body text with a [link to Quarto](https://quarto.org).

Use `.text-emphasis` for [important text]{.text-emphasis} or `.font-normal` for [lighter weight]{.font-normal}.

## Code

```python
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"
```

## Callouts

::: {.callout-note}
This is a note callout using the theme's primary color.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
This is a tip callout.
:::

## Buttons

[Download]{.btn .btn-primary}

## Categories

[machine learning]{.category} [NLP]{.category} [research]{.category}
